_doc: Canonical model-tier map (overhaul task 10, adaptive model). Per agent, per capability tier. Deterministic resolver: scripts/resolve_model.mjs. Codex values mirror the tested local config and custom-agent profiles; opencode values generate opencode.json. Claude values remain advisory for sub-agent routing. NEVER auto-configure provider switching for Claude Code (account-ban risk).

effort._doc: Reasoning effort per agent tier. resolve_model.mjs exposes it with --effort. Custom Codex reviewer uses the mid-tier terra model with an explicit xhigh exception in codex/agents/harness-reviewer.toml.
